713.bio: He was the last of the Quraishi companion to die.

717.arabic: محمد بن حطاب بن الحارث بن معمر

718.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Harith bin Ma'mar b. Habib b. Wahb b. Hudhafa b. Jumah b. 'Amr b. Husays b. Ka'b
718.arabic: عبد الله بن الحارث بن معمر
718.father_name: Harith bin Ma'mar b. Habib b. Wahb b. Hudhafa

719.full_name: Sahl bin Wahb b. Rabi'ah b. Hilal b. Malik b. Dhabah b. al-Harith b. Fihr
719.bio: He was hiding his Islam till he was captured at Badr.

720.full_name: Sufyan bin Ma'mar b. Habib b. Wahb b. Hudhafa b. Jumah b. 'Amr b. Husays b. Ka'b
720.father_name: Ma'mar b. Habib b. Wahb b. Hudhafa

721.full_name: Hasana, mother of Shurahbil, Client of B.Jumah

722.full_name: Shurahbil bin 'Abdullah b. al-Muta' b. 'Amr b. Kinda

723.full_name: Jabir bin Sufyan bin Ma'mar b. Habib b. Wahb b. Hudhafa b. Jumah b. 'Amr b. Husays b. Ka'b
723.arabic: جابر بن سفيان بن معمر بن حبيب

734.mother_name: Fakhitah bint 'Amir b. Nawfal b. 'Abd Manaf

744.bio: Some said that it was a daughter. Also called Hurmayla.

745.full_name: Qays bin 'Abdullah of Bani Asad bin Khuzayma (Ally of B. Umayya)
745.bio: He was friend of 'Ubaidullah bin Jahsh who apostate in Abysssina and became christian.

746.full_name: Baraka bint Yasar al-Azdi (freed woman of Abu Sufyan)

747.full_name: Mu'ayqayb bin Abi Fatima al-Dausi (ally of B. Umayya)

748.full_name: Firas bin al-Nadr b. al-Harith b. 'Alqama b. Kulda b. 'Abd Manaf b. 'Abd al-Dar b. Qusayy b. Kilab
748.mother_name: Zainab bint al-Nabash b. Zararah al-Taymi

749.full_name: Suwaybit b. Sa'd b. Harmala b. Malik b. 'Umiala b. al-Sabaq b. 'Abd al-Dar b. Qusayy b. Kilab
749.mother_name: Hunida bint Khabab Abi Sarhan al-Khaziyah

750.full_name: Abu Qays bin al-Harith b. Qays b. 'Adi b. Sa'd b. Sahm b. 'Amr b. Husays b. Ka'b b. Lu'ayy

751.full_name: 'Abdullah bin al-Harith b. Qays b. 'Aidy b. Sa'd b. Sahm b. 'Amr b. Husays b. Ka'b b. Lua'yy
751.arabic: عبد الله بن الحارث بن قيس
751.mother_name: Umm al-hajjaj of bani Shunof b. Murrah Kanania
751.bio: Others said that he was martyred in battle of Yamamah in 12 AH.

752.full_name: al-Sa'ib bin al-Harith b. Qays b. 'Adi b. Sa'd b. Sahm b. 'Amr b. Husays b. Ka'b b. Lua'yy
752.mother_name: Umm al-hajjaj of bani Shunof b. Murrah Kanania

757.full_name: Sa'id bin al-Harith b. Qays b. 'Aidy b. Sa'd b. Sahm b. 'Amr b. Husays b. Ka'b b. Lua'yy
757.bio: Some say he was martyred at battle of Yarmouk in 15 AH.

758.full_name: Ma'mar bin al-Harith b. Qays b. 'Aidy b. Sa'd b. Sahm b. 'Amr b. Husays b. Ka'b b. Lua'yy
758.bio: Some say his name was M'ad or M'abad.

759.full_name: 'Umayr bin Ri'ab bin Hudhayfa b. Muhashshim b. Sa'd b. Sahm b. 'Amr b. Husays b. Ka'b b. Lua'yy

759.mother_name: Umm Wi'al bint Ma'mar bin Wahb al-Jumhi

760.arabic: محمية بن جزء الزبيدي حليف بني سهم

761.arabic: يزيد/ زيد بن زمعة بن الأسود
761.father_name: Zama'a b. al-Aswad b. al-Muttalib b. Asad
761.mother_name: Qurayba al-kubra bint Abi Umayyah Makhzumi
761.bio: Others said that He was martyred in battle of Hunain.

762.full_name: 'Amr bin Umayya bin al-Harith b. Asad b. 'Abd al-'Uzza b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah

763.full_name: 'Amr bin 'Uthman bin 'Amr b. 'Amir b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murrah

764.arabic: عمير بن عوف مولى سهيل بن عمرو
764.bio: According to some sources, he was from ansar.

765.full_name: 'Utbah ibn Mas'ud b. Ghafil b. Habib b. Shamkh b. Far b. Makhzum b. Sahilah b. Kahil b. al-Harith

766.full_name: al-Muttalib bin Azhar b. 'Abd 'Awf b. 'Abd b. al-Harith b. Zuhrah b. Kilab b. Murrah

768.arabic: عبد الله بن المطلب بن أزهر
768.bio: First person in Islam to Inherit father's property.

769.full_name: Tulayb bin Azhar b. 'Abd 'Awf b. 'Abd b. al-Harith b. Zuhrah b. Kilab b. Murrah
769.arabic: طليب بن أزهر بن عبد عوف الزهري

770.full_name: al-Harith bin Khalid b. Sakhar b. 'Amir b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murrah
770.bio: His wife and 3 kids died on return from Abyssinia.

771.full_name: Rayta (Rabtah) bint al-Harith bin Jabala b. 'Amir b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murrah
771.bio: She and her 3 kids died on return from Abyssinia.

772.full_name: Fatima bint al-Harith bin Khalid b. Sakhar b. 'Amir b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murrah

773.full_name: al-Aswad bin Khalaf b. As'ad b. 'Amir b. Bayada b. Sabi' b. J'athma b. Sa'd b. Malih b. 'Amr

774.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Khalaf b. As'ad b. 'Amir b. Bayada b. Sabi' b. J'athma b. Sa'd b. Malih b. 'Amr
774.arabic: عبد الله بن خلف بن أسعد

775.full_name: Salama bin Hisham b. al-Mughirah b. 'Abdullah b. 'Umar b. Makhzum b. Yaqazah b. Murrah

776.full_name: 'Ayyash bin Abi Rabi'a b. al-Mughirah b. 'Abdullah b. 'Umar b. Makhzum b. Yaqazah b. Murrah
776.bio: He was sent to some rulers of Yemen of Himyar. Some said that he was martyred in the battle of Yarmouk or Yamama.

777.full_name: Asma' bint Salama/Makhrabah b. Jandal b. Abiar b. Nahshal b. Darum al-Tamimia

778.full_name: 'Abdullah bin 'Ayyash bin Abi Rabi'a b. al-Mughirah b. 'Abdullah b. 'Umar b. Makhzum b. Yaqazah

779.short_name: Asma' bint Makhrabah b. Jandal al-Tamimi

779.spouses: Hisham bin al-Mughirah,Abu Rabi'a ('Amr) b. al-Mughirah

780.full_name: Hisham bin Abu Hudhayfa b. al-Mughirah b. 'Abdullah b. 'Umar b. Makhzum b. Yaqazah b. Murrah
780.arabic: هشام بن أبي حذيفة بن المغيرة

781.full_name: Habbar bin Sufyan bin 'Abd al-Asad bin Hilal b. 'Abdullah b. 'Umar b. Makhzum b. Yaqazah b. Murrah
781.arabic: هبار بن سفيان بن عبد الأسد
781.mother_name: bint 'Abd bin Abi Qays b. 'Abdoo of 'Amir b. Lu'ay
781.bio: Some said he was martyred at Yarmouk.

782.full_name: 'Abdulla bin Sufyan bin 'Abd al-Asad bin Hilal b. 'Abdullah b. 'Umar b. Makhzum b. Yaqazah b. Murrah
782.arabic: عبد الله بن سفيان بن عبد الأسد
782.mother_name: bint 'Abd bin Abi Qays b. 'Abdoo of 'Amir b. Lu'ay

783.full_name: Ma'mar bin 'Abdullah (b. Nafi') b. Nadla b. 'Auf b. 'Ubaid b. 'Uwaij b. 'Adi b. Ka'b b. Lu'ayy
783.arabic: معمر بن عبد الله بن نضلة
783.bio:
He used to take care Prophet's Hair. He came to Medina from Abyssinia in 7 AH via the 2 boats sent by al-Najashi.
Also Known as: Ma'mar bin Abi Ma'mar

784.full_name: 'Adiy bin Nadla bin 'Abdul-'Uzza b. Harthan b. 'Auf b. 'Ubaid b. 'Uwaij b. 'Adi b. Ka'b b. Lu'ayy

785.full_name: al-Nu'man bin 'Adi bin Nadla bin 'Abdul-'Uzza b. Harthan b. 'Auf b. 'Ubaid b. 'Uwaij b. 'Adi b. Ka'b
785.bio: He came to Medina from Abyssinia in 7 AH via the 2 boats sent by al-Najashi

786.full_name: 'Urwa bin Abi Athatha bin 'Abdul-'Uzza b. Harthan b. 'Auf b. 'Ubaid b. 'Uwaij b. 'Adi b. Ka'b b. Lu'
786.arabic: عروة بن أبي أثاثة بن عبد العزي
786.bio: His lineage is also given as: 'Urwa bin 'Abdul-'Uzza b. Harthan b. 'Auf b. 'Ubaid b. 'Uwaij b. 'Adiy b. Ka'b b. Lu'ayy (Ashabah Id: 5525)

787.full_name: Malik bin Zama'a b. Qays b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Wud b. Nasr b. Malik b. Hisl b. 'Amir b. Lu'ayy
787.mother_name: al-Shammus bint Qais b. Zaid b. 'Amr of Najjar

788.full_name: 'Amrah bint 'Amr bin Waqdan b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Wud b. Nasr b. Malik b. Hisl b. 'Amir b. Lu'ayy
788.mother_name: bint al-Hujaja bin'Amir of B. Sahm

789.full_name: Amr bin Al-Harith bin Zuhayr b. Abi Shaddad b. Rabi'a b. Hilal b. Malik b. Dabba b. al-Harith b Fihr
789.father_name: Al-Harith bin Zuhayr b. Abi Shaddad
789.mother_name: Hind bint al-Madrab b. 'Amr of B.'Amir

790.full_name: Uthman/'Amir bin 'Abd Ghanm b. Zuhayr b. Abi Shaddad b. Rabi'a b. Hilal b Malik b Dabba b al-Harith
790.arabic: عثمان بن عبد غنم بن زهير
790.father_name: 'Abd Ghanm bin Zuhayr  b. Abi Shaddad

791.full_name: Sa'id bin 'Abd Qays bin Laqit b. 'Amir b. Umayya b. al-Darub b. al-Harith b. Fihr
791.arabic: سعيد بن عبد قيس بن لقيط

792.full_name: Al-Harith bin 'Abd Qays bin Laqit b. 'Amir b. Umayya b. al-Darub b. al-Harith b. Fihr
792.arabic: الحارث بن عبد قيس بن لقيط

793.full_name: Ayadh bin Zuhayr b. Abi Shaddad b. Rabi'a b. Hilal b. Malik b. Dabba b. al-Harith b. Fihr
793.arabic: عياض بن زهير بن أبي شداد

795.full_name: Nabia bin 'Uthman b. Rabi'a b. Uhban b. Wahb b. Hudhafa b. Jumah b. 'Amr
795.bio: According to some sources, the father,  'Uthman b. Rabia'a b. Uhban went to Abyssinia and not his son Nabia.

796.bio: An Ally of B. 'Amir b. Lu'ayy or client of Abu Rahm bin 'Abdul-'Uzza al-'Amiri.

797.full_name: Ma'mur or 'Amr bin Abu Sarh b. Rabi'a b. Hilal b. Malik b. Dhabah b al-Harith b. Fihr
797.arabic: عمرو / معمر بن أبى سرح بن ربيعة
797.father_name: Abu Sarh b. Rabi'a b. Hilal
797.mother_name: Zaynab bint Rabi'a b. Wahb al-'Amiry
797.spouses: Umamah bint 'Amir b. Rabi'a al-Fihry,Sisiter of Abu 'Ubiadah

798.full_name: 'Uthman bin 'Uthman b. al-Sharid b. Harmi b.'Amir b. Makhzum

799.full_name: Safwan bin Wahb b. Rabi'ah b. Hilal b. Malik b. Dhabah b. al-Harith b. Fihr b. Malik b. al-Nadr
799.bio: According to other sources, he was not martyred at Badr but died later in 38 AH.
